Name: batch_size_grokking
Title: Batch Size Grokking: Assessing the impact of the training batchsize on the grokking phenomenon
Experiment: Modify the experiments to dynamically adjust the batch size during training, starting with a small batch size and gradually increasing it. This could potentially lead to faster generalization on the validation set.

Name: optimizer_grokking_analysis
Title: Optimizer Grokking Analysis: Investigating the Relationship between Optimizers and Generalization
Experiment: Modify the experiment to analyze the optimization process and model behavior during training. Compare the performance of different optimizers and identify patterns or correlations between the optimizer and the emergence of grokking.
